description:
Welcome to the documentation for Cloudbeds API Version v1.3! If you are looking to learn how to use the Cloudbeds API to access guest information, reservations, or similar data for your Cloudbeds customers, then you've come to the right place.

In this document you will find all the API methods we provide along with explanations for parameters and response examples.

If you have questions about different implementation steps (e.g. how to implement OAuth 2.0), please refer to our Integrations Portal.

Be sure to subscribe to the monthly Cloudbeds API announcement mailing list to receive information on new additions and improvements to the Cloudbeds API and related developer tools.

Endpoint: https://api.cloudbeds.com/api/v1.3/{method}

HTTPS: Our API requires HTTPS. We'll respond with an appropriate error if you're not using it.

Request Format: HTTP GET, POST and PUT (Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded)

Response Format: JSON

Response Header: X-Request-ID is added to response headers in all calls to help accelerate support and troubleshooting.

use this link to access our Public collection in Postman.

tools.name: access-token_create
tools.description: Query the authorization server for an access token used to access property resources.</br> If the automatic delivery method for API keys is used, the grant type `urn:ietf:params:oauth:grant-type:api-key` needs to be used to request an API key. This grant type requires `grant_type=urn:ietf:params:oauth:grant-type:api-key`, `client_id`, `client_secret`, `redirect_uri` and `code`.</br> For OAuth 2.0., two different grant types (`authorization_code`, `refresh_token`) are supported. Authorization code grant type requires `grant_type=authorization_code`, `client_id`, `client_secret`, `redirect_uri`, `code`. Refresh token grant type requires `grant_type=refresh_token`, `client_id`, `client_secret`, `refresh_token`.</br> Read the [Authentication guide](https://integrations.cloudbeds.com/hc/en-us/sections/14731510501915-Authentication) for implementation tips, user flows and testing advice. Optional: client_id, client_secret, code (plus 3 more). Returns the new PostAccessTokenResponse.

params.name: client_id
params.description: The client identifier. Each client must be provisioned an identifier.

params.name: client_secret
params.description: The client secret. Each client must be provisioned a secret.

params.name: code
params.description: An authorization code provisioned by /oauth (Required for grant type 'authorization_code' and 'urn:ietf:params:oauth:grant-type:api-key').

params.name: redirect_uri
params.description: The client pre-configured redirect URI. (Required for grant type 'authorization_code' and 'urn:ietf:params:oauth:grant-type:api-key').

params.name: refresh_token
params.description: A refresh token to renew an access_token (Required for grant type 'refresh_token' only).

tools.name: append-custom-item_create
tools.description: Append single, or multiple, custom items and their associated payments to an existing one in a Reservation, House Account, or Group. Optional: groupCode, guestID, guestName (plus 10 more). Returns the new PostAppendCustomItemResponse.

params.name: groupCode
params.description: Group code. Required if no reservationID or houseAccountID is provided.

params.name: houseAccountID
params.description: House Account identifier. Required if no reservationID or groupCode is provided.

params.name: itemPaid
params.description: If the item is already paid. Note: If set to true, a payment in cash will be registered for the total value of the item, taxes and fees. If this is not the expected behavior, set to false, and register the operation manually. (Ignored if payments array exist)

params.name: items
params.description: list of items will be posted

params.name: payments
params.description: list of payments If the item is already paid

params.name: referenceID
params.description: partner's transaction reference. If exist then Cloudbeds will prevent adding of duplicates

params.name: reservationID
params.description: Reservation identifier. Required if no houseAccountID or groupCode is provided.

tools.name: create-allotment-block_create
tools.description: Retreive allotment blocks @apiQuery {Integer} propertyID Property ID. Optional: allotmentBlockName, allotmentBlockStatus, allotmentIntervals (plus 7 more). Returns array of CreateAllotmentBlockCreateItem.

params.name: allotmentBlockName
params.description: The name for the allotment block

params.name: allotmentBlockStatus
params.description: The status for the allotment block under

params.name: allotmentIntervals
params.description: The day-based data for the allotment block.

params.name: allowOverbooking
params.description: If false, or omitted, then this command will fail if it would result in an overbooking. If true, then the update will succeed even if it results in an overbooking.

params.name: eventCode
params.description: The unique identifier of the event the allotment block should be created

params.name: groupCode
params.description: The unique identifier of the group profile the allotment block should be created

params.name: ratePlanId
params.description: The rate plan ID. Required if rateType is 'rate_plan'.

params.name: rateType
params.description: The rate type for the associated intervals

tools.name: create-allotment-block-notes_create
tools.description: Add a note to an allotment block. Optional: allotmentBlockCode, propertyID, text. Returns the new PostCreateAllotmentBlockNotesResponse.

tools.name: delete-adjustment_delete
tools.description: Voids the AdjustmentID transaction on the specified reservationID. Required: reservationID, adjustmentID. Optional: propertyID. Returns the DeleteAdjustmentResponse. Destructive.

tools.name: delete-allotment-block_create
tools.description: Delete allotment blocks. Optional: allotmentBlockCode. Returns the new PostDeleteAllotmentBlockResponse.

params.name: allotmentBlockCode
params.description: The unique code of the allotment Block

tools.name: delete-app-property-settings_create
tools.description: Delete app property settings. Optional: key, propertyID. Returns the new PostDeleteAppPropertySettingsResponse.

tools.name: delete-guest-note_delete
tools.description: Archives an existing guest note. Required: guestID, noteID. Optional: propertyID. Returns the DeleteGuestNoteResponse. Destructive.

tools.name: delete-reservation-note_delete
tools.description: Archives an existing reservation note. Required: reservationID, reservationNoteID. Optional: propertyID. Returns the DeleteReservationNoteResponse. Destructive.

tools.name: delete-room-block_delete
tools.description: Deletes a room block. Required: roomBlockID. Optional: propertyID. Returns the DeleteRoomBlockResponse. Destructive.

tools.name: delete-webhook_delete
tools.description: Remove subscription for webhook. Read the [Webhooks guide](https://integrations.cloudbeds.com/hc/en-us/articles/360007612553-Webhooks) to see available objects, actions, payload info and more. ### Group account support. Required: subscriptionID. Optional: propertyIDs. Returns the DeleteWebhookResponse. Destructive.

params.name: propertyIDs
params.description: List of property IDs, comma-separated, i.e. 37,345,89

tools.name: get-allotment-blocks_list
tools.description: Retrieve allotment blocks. Required: propertyID. Optional: allotmentBlockCode, allotmentBlockName, groupCode (plus 9 more). Returns array of GetAllotmentBlocksListItem.

params.name: propertyID
params.description: Property ID (optional, by default all authorized properties will be included)

params.name: roomTypeID
params.description: Filters allotment blocks with the supplied Room Type ID.

params.name: pageSize
params.description: Number of allotment blocks to return per page (min: 1, max: 100)

params.name: pageNumber
params.description: Which page in the results to access

params.name: forUpdate
params.description: If false (default) this will show the effective availability on each date. If true, will read raw availability from the allotment intervals.

tools.name: get-app-property-settings_list
tools.description: Returns the app property settings. Required: propertyID. Optional: key.

tools.name: get-app-settings_list
tools.description:
Get the current app settings for a property.
. Optional: propertyID. Returns the GetAppSettingsResponse.

tools.name: get-app-state_list
tools.description:
Get the current app integration state for a property.
This call is only available for third-party integration partners, and not for property client IDs. Read the [Connecting/Disconnecting Apps guide](https://integrations.cloudbeds.com/hc/en-us/articles/360007613213-Connecting-Disconnecting-Apps) to further understand the use cases. Optional: propertyID. Returns the GetAppStateResponse.

tools.name: get-available-room-types_list
tools.description: Returns a list of room types with availability considering the informed parameters ### Group account support. Required: startDate, endDate, rooms (default: 1), adults (default: 1), children. Optional: propertyIDs, promoCode, detailedRates (default: false) (plus 7 more).

params.name: includeSharedRooms
params.description: Include shared rooms in the result for multiple adults/children

params.name: minRate
params.description: Minimum daily rate. Used to filter results

params.name: maxRate
params.description: Maximum daily rate. Used to filter results

tools.name: get-currency-settings_list
tools.description: Get currency settings. Optional: propertyID. Returns the GetCurrencySettingsResponse.

tools.name: get-custom-fields_list
tools.description:
Gets custom fields list
¹ data.displayed = 'booking' - Display this field to guests on the booking engine.
¹ data.displayed = 'reservation' - Add this field to the reservation folio for use by staff.
¹ data.displayed = 'card' - Make this field available for registration cards.
. Optional: propertyID, customFieldID, shortcode. Returns array of GetCustomFieldsListItem.

params.name: shortcode
params.description: Internal reference and is used for integration purposes such as custom links and the API

tools.name: get-dashboard_list
tools.description: Returns basic information about the current state of the hotel. Optional: propertyID, date.

params.name: date
params.description: Return data for this date. Format: YYYY-MM-DD

tools.name: get-email-schedule_list
tools.description: Returns a list of all existing email scheduling. This call is only available for third-party integration partners, and not for property client IDs. Optional: propertyID.

tools.name: get-email-templates_list
tools.description: Returns a list of all existing email templates. This call is only available for third-party integration partners, and not for property client IDs. Optional: propertyID.

tools.name: get-files_list
tools.description: Returns a list of files attached to a hotel or group profile, ordered by creation date. Optional: propertyID, groupCode, sortBy (default: date) (plus 4 more).

params.name: groupCode
params.description: The group code, if the files are to be fetched from a group profile

params.name: orderBy
params.description: Order response in DESCending or ASCending order, used together with sortBy

params.name: name
params.description: Filter filess by name. Include only with names containing specified string

tools.name: get-group-notes_list
tools.description: Returns group notes. Required: propertyID, groupCode, pageSize, pageNumber.

params.name: pageSize
params.description: Number of groups notes to return per page (min: 1, max: 100)

params.name: pageNumber
params.description: Which page in the results to access

tools.name: get-groups_list
tools.description: Returns the groups for a property. Required: propertyID. Optional: groupCode, type, status (plus 4 more).

params.name: pageSize
params.description: Number of groups to return per page (min: 1, max: 100)

params.name: pageNumber
params.description: Which page in the results to access

tools.name: get-guest_list
tools.description: Returns information on a guest specified by the Reservation ID parameter. Optional: propertyID, reservationID, guestID (plus 1 more).

params.name: reservationID
params.description: Reservation Unique Identifier. Required if no guestID is provided.

params.name: guestID
params.description: Guest ID. Required if no reservationID is provided.

params.name: includeGuestRequirements
params.description: Includes guest requirements data in the response

tools.name: get-guest-list_list
tools.description: Returns a list of guests, ordered by modification date ### Group account support. Optional: propertyIDs, resultsFrom, resultsTo (plus 16 more).

params.name: propertyIDs
params.description: List of property IDs, comma-separated, i.e. 37,345,89

params.name: resultsFrom
params.description: Inferior limit datetime, used to filter guests result, based on latest creation/modification date

params.name: resultsTo
params.description: Superior limit datetime, used to filter guests result, based on latest creation/modification date

params.name: checkInFrom
params.description: Filters guests result to return only guests with check-in date range starting on this date

params.name: checkInTo
params.description: Filters guests result to return only guests with check-in date range ending on this date

params.name: checkOutFrom
params.description: Filters guests result to return only guests with check-out date range starting on this date

params.name: checkOutTo
params.description: Filters guests result to return only guests with check-out date range ending on this date

params.name: guestFirstName
params.description: Filters guests result based on Guest First Name

params.name: guestLastName
params.description: Filters guests result based on Guest Last Name

params.name: guestEmail
params.description: Filters guests result based on Guest Email

params.name: guestPhone
params.description: Filters guests result based on Guest Phone Number

params.name: guestCellPhone
params.description: Filters guests result based on Guest Cell Phone Number

params.name: status
params.description:
Reservation status
If more than one, send as comma-separated values. i.e. in_progress,confirmed

params.name: includeGuestInfo
params.description: If API response should return with more of Guest's information

params.name: excludeSecondaryGuests
params.description: If true, response only returns main guest's

params.name: includeGuestRequirements
params.description: Includes guest requirements data in the response

tools.name: get-guest-notes_list
tools.description: Retrieves a guest notes. Required: guestID. Optional: propertyID. Returns array of GetGuestNotesListItem.

tools.name: get-guests-by-filter_list
tools.description: Returns a list of guests matching the selected parameters ### Group account support. Required: status. Optional: propertyIDs, reservationID, roomID (plus 5 more).

params.name: propertyIDs
params.description: List of property IDs, comma-separated, i.e. 37,345,89

params.name: checkInFrom
params.description: Filters guests result to return only guests with check-in date range starting on this date

params.name: checkInTo
params.description: Filters guests result to return only guests with check-in date range ending on this date

params.name: checkOutFrom
params.description: Filters guests result to return only guests with check-out date range starting on this date

params.name: checkOutTo
params.description: Filters guests result to return only guests with check-out date range ending on this date

tools.name: get-guests-by-status_list
tools.description: Returns a list of guests in the current status (Not Checked In, In House, Checked Out or Cancelled), sorted by modification date. If no date range is passed, it returns all guests with the selected status. ### Group account support. Required: status. Optional: propertyID, resultsFrom, resultsTo (plus 2 more).

params.name: propertyID
params.description:
ID for the properties to be queried (comma-separated, i.e. 37,345,89).
It can be omitted if the API key is single-property, or to get results from all properties on an association.

params.name: resultsFrom
params.description: Used to filter guests result, and returns only the guests that were last modified starting on 'resultsFrom' value

params.name: resultsTo
params.description: Used to filter guests result, and returns only the guests that were last modified ending on 'resultsTo' value

tools.name: get-guests-modified_list
tools.description: Returns a list of guests based on their modification date. Note that when a guest checks in or checks out of a room, their record is modified at that time. If no date range is passed, only the records for the current day are returned. Also note that if the guest is assigned to multiple rooms, it will result in multiple records. ### Group account support. Optional: propertyIDs, inHouse (default: false), resultsFrom (plus 8 more).

params.name: propertyIDs
params.description: List of property IDs, comma-separated, i.e. 37,345,89

params.name: inHouse
params.description: When used, and true, will return guests only currently in-house. If the guest checks-out, it will not appear on the results.

params.name: resultsFrom
params.description: Inferior limit datetime, used to filter guests result, based on latest creation/modification date

params.name: resultsTo
params.description: Superior limit datetime, used to filter guests result, based on latest creation/modification date

params.name: checkInFrom
params.description: Filters guests result to return only guests with check-in date range starting on this date

params.name: checkInTo
params.description: Filters guests result to return only guests with check-in date range ending on this date

params.name: checkOutFrom
params.description: Filters guests result to return only guests with check-out date range starting on this date

params.name: checkOutTo
params.description: Filters guests result to return only guests with check-out date range ending on this date

params.name: includeGuestRequirements
params.description: Includes guest requirements data in the response

tools.name: get-hotel-details_list
tools.description: Returns the details of a specific hotel, identified by 'propertyID'. Optional: propertyID.

tools.name: get-hotels_list
tools.description: Returns a list of hotels, filtered by the parameters passed ### Group account support. Optional: propertyIDs, propertyName, propertyCity (plus 2 more).

params.name: propertyIDs
params.description: List of property IDs, comma-separated, i.e. 37,345,89

params.name: propertyName
params.description: Property name, or part of it

params.name: propertyCity
params.description: Property city, or part of it

tools.name: get-house-account-list_list
tools.description: Pulls list of active house accounts. Optional: propertyID. Returns array of GetHouseAccountListListItem.

tools.name: get-housekeepers_list
tools.description: Returns a list of housekeepers ### Group account support. Optional: propertyID, pageNumber (default: 1), pageSize (default: 100).

params.name: propertyID
params.description: ID for the properties to be queried (comma-separated, i.e. 37,345,89). It can be omitted if the API key is single-property, or to get results from all properties on an association.

tools.name: get-housekeeping-status_list
tools.description: Returns the current date's housekeeping information The housekeeping status is calculated basing on the set of fields roomOccupied | roomCondition | roomBlocked | vacantPickup | roomBlocked | refusedService The available statuses are: - Vacant and Dirty (VD): false | “dirty” | false | false | false | false - Occupied and Dirty (OD): true | “dirty” | false | false | false | false - Vacant and Clean (VC): false | “clean” | false | false | false | false - Occupied and Clean (OC): true | “clean” | false | false | false | false - Occupied and Clean Inspected (OCI): true | “inspected” | false | false | false | false - Vacant and Clean Inspected (VCI): false | “inspected” | false | false | false | false - Do Not Disturb (DND): if doNotDisturb is true - Refused Service (RS): if refusedService is true - Out of Order (OOO): if roomBlocked is true - Vacant and Pickup (VP): if vacantPickup is true. Optional: propertyID, roomTypeIDs, housekeeperIDs (plus 4 more).

params.name: roomTypeIDs
params.description: Filter by room type ID. If more than one, send as comma-separated, i.e. 37,345,89

params.name: housekeeperIDs
params.description: Use this parameter to filter by housekeeper. If you need to specify multiple housekeepers, send their IDs as a comma-separated list (e.g., 37, 345, 89). To retrieve unassigned housekeepers, use the value 0.

params.name: roomOccupied
params.description: Flag for current room occupation status

tools.name: get-item_list
tools.description:
Gets the details for the one itemID
1 only if data.stockInventory = true
2 Taxes, fees and totals will show up only if an item has assigned tax or fee.
. Required: itemID. Optional: propertyID. Returns the GetItemResponse.

tools.name: get-item-categories_list
tools.description: Gets the item category list. Optional: propertyID. Returns array of GetItemCategoriesListItem.

tools.name: get-items_list
tools.description:
Gets all the items and their prices the hotel has created in myfrontdesk
1 only if data.stockInventory = true
2 Taxes, fees and totals will show up only if an item has assigned tax or fee.
. Optional: propertyID, itemCategoryID. Returns array of GetItemsListItem.

tools.name: get-package-names_list
tools.description: Return a list of billing package names for a property. Optional: propertyID. Returns the GetPackagesResponse.

tools.name: get-packages_list
tools.description: This efficient method allows you to retrieve the collection of packages associated with a property. Packages here define a group of features that a property has the ability to utilize or access. By invoking this API method, developers will get a comprehensive view of the feature sets that are available and active for a specific property. The getPackages method boasts a seamless execution that offers essential information, vital in enhancing property management, understanding available functionalities and ultimately, optimizing user experience. Optional: propertyID. Returns the GetPackagesResponse.

tools.name: get-payment-methods_list
tools.description: Get a list of active methods for a property, or list of properties. Optional: propertyID, lang (default: en). Returns the GetPaymentMethodsResponse.

params.name: propertyID
params.description: ID for the property to be queried

params.name: lang
params.description: Language that payment methods name should return (if available).

tools.name: get-payments-capabilities_list
tools.description: Lists the payment capabilities of a given property. Optional: propertyID. Returns array of GetPaymentsCapabilitiesListItem.

params.name: propertyID
params.description: ID for the property to be queried

tools.name: get-rate_list
tools.description: Returns the rate of the room type selected, based on the provided parameters. Required: roomTypeID, startDate, endDate. Optional: adults, children, detailedRates (default: false) (plus 1 more).

params.name: detailedRates
params.description: If the rates need detailed information

params.name: promoCode
params.description: Return information for one or more specific rate plans by promo code. This parameter is DEPRECATED and not recommended for usage. Use method getRatePlans instead

tools.name: get-rate-jobs_list
tools.description: Returns a list of Rate Jobs. Rate jobs are only returned within 7 days of creation, after 7 days they will not be returned in the response. Requests which do not provide a jobReferenceID will be filtered by the client ID of the request's token. Optional: jobReferenceID, status.

params.name: status
params.description: Filter Rate Jobs based on status

tools.name: get-rate-plans_list
tools.description: Returns the rates of the room type or promo code selected, based on the provided parameters. If no parameters are provided, then the method will return all publicly available rate plans. ### Group account support. Required: startDate, endDate. Optional: propertyIDs, rateIDs, roomTypeID (plus 6 more).

params.name: propertyIDs
params.description: List of property IDs, comma-separated, i.e. 37,345,89

params.name: rateIDs
params.description: List of Rate IDs, comma-separated, i.e. 37,345,89

params.name: roomTypeID
params.description: List of Room Type IDs, comma-separated, i.e. 37,345,89

params.name: promoCode
params.description: List of Promo Codes, comma-separated, i.e. 37,345,89

params.name: includePromoCode
params.description: Include rate plans with promo code

params.name: detailedRates
params.description: If the rates need detailed information

params.name: includeSharedRooms
params.description: Include shared rooms in the result for multiple adults/children

tools.name: get-reservation_list
tools.description: Returns information on a booking specified by the reservationID parameter. Required: reservationID. Optional: propertyID, includeGuestRequirements (default: false).

params.name: reservationID
params.description: Reservation Unique Identifier. Obtained from one of the 'Reservations' group methods

params.name: includeGuestRequirements
params.description: Includes guest requirements data in the response.

tools.name: get-reservation-assignments_list
tools.description: Returns a list of rooms/reservations assigned for a selected date. Optional: propertyID, date.

params.name: date
params.description: Date selected to get the assignments. If no date is passed, it will return the results for the current day.

tools.name: get-reservation-notes_list
tools.description: Retrieves reservation notes based on parameters. Required: reservationID. Optional: propertyID. Returns array of GetReservationNotesListItem.

tools.name: get-reservation-room-details_list
tools.description: Returns information about particular room in reservation by its subReservationID. Required: subReservationID. Optional: propertyID.

params.name: subReservationID
params.description: Sub Reservation ID of the specific assigned room

tools.name: get-reservations_list
tools.description:
Returns a list of reservations that matched the filters criteria.
Please note that some reservations modification may not be reflected in this timestamp. ### Group account support. Optional: propertyID, status, resultsFrom (plus 26 more).

params.name: propertyID
params.description:
ID for the properties to be queried (comma-separated, i.e. 37,345,89).
It can be omitted if the API key is single-property, or to get results from all properties on an association.

params.name: resultsFrom
params.description: Inferior limit datetime, used to filter reservations, based on booking date

params.name: resultsTo
params.description: Superior limit datetime, used to filter reservations, based on booking date

params.name: modifiedFrom
params.description: Inferior limit datetime, used to filter reservations, based on booking modification date

params.name: modifiedTo
params.description: Superior limit datetime, used to filter reservations, based on booking modification date

params.name: checkInFrom
params.description: Filters reservations result to return only reservations with check-in date range starting on this date

params.name: checkInTo
params.description: Filters reservations result to return only reservations with check-in date range ending on this date

params.name: checkOutFrom
params.description: Filters reservations result to return only reservations with check-out date range starting on this date

params.name: checkOutTo
params.description: Filters reservations result to return only reservations with check-out date range ending on this date

params.name: datesQueryMode
params.description: If we should consider the booking's check-in/check-out dates or the start and end dates for the associated rooms.

params.name: roomID
params.description: Filters reservation with the supplied room ID. CheckIn/checkOut dates OR status are required. If dates are provided and span more than one day, more than one reservation can be returned. If roomID supplied, roomName is ignored.

params.name: roomName
params.description: Filters reservation with the supplied room name (customizable by each property). CheckIn/checkOut dates OR status are required. If dates are provided and span more than one day, more than one reservation can be returned.

params.name: roomTypeID
params.description: Filters reservation with the supplied Room Type ID.

params.name: includeGuestsDetails
params.description: If guests details should be included or not

params.name: includeGuestRequirements
params.description: Includes guest requirements data in the response. Requires `includeGuestsDetails=true`.

params.name: includeCustomFields
params.description: If reservation custom fields should be included or not

params.name: includeAllRooms
params.description: When specified, the response will include an additional rooms field that combines both unassigned and assigned rooms.

params.name: sourceId
params.description: Filters reservation with the supplied source ID.

params.name: sourceReservationId
params.description: Filters reservation with the supplied reservation source ID.

params.name: ratePlanId
params.description: Filters reservation with the supplied rate plan ID.

params.name: firstName
params.description: Filters reservation with the supplied primary guest first name.

params.name: lastName
params.description: Filters reservation with the supplied primary guest last name.

params.name: guestID
params.description: Filters reservation with the supplied Guest ID (Including additional guests).

params.name: allotmentBlockCode
params.description: Filters reservation with the supplied allotment block code.

params.name: groupCode
params.description: Filters reservation with the supplied group code.

params.name: sortByRecent
params.description: Sort response results by most recent action

tools.name: get-reservations-with-rate-details_list
tools.description:
Returns a list of reservations with added information regarding booked rates and sources.
Please note that some reservations modification may not be reflected in this timestamp. Optional: propertyID, resultsFrom, resultsTo (plus 14 more).

params.name: resultsFrom
params.description: Inferior limit datetime, used to filter reservations, based on booking date

params.name: resultsTo
params.description: Superior limit datetime, used to filter reservations, based on booking date. If it is not set, will return the reservations up to current date

params.name: modifiedFrom
params.description: Superior limit datetime, used to filter reservations, based on modification date.

params.name: modifiedTo
params.description: Superior limit datetime, used to filter reservations, based on modification date.

params.name: sortByRecent
params.description: Sort response results by most recent action

params.name: reservationID
params.description: Reservation identifiers, comma-separated, i.e. 37,345,89, used to return transactions limited to the selected reservations.

params.name: reservationCheckOutFrom
params.description: Superior limit datetime, used to filter reservations, based on reservation check-out date.

params.name: reservationCheckOutTo
params.description: Superior limit datetime, used to filter reservations, based on reservation check-out date.

params.name: excludeStatuses
params.description: List of statuses (separated by comma) to be excluded from search

params.name: includeGuestsDetails
params.description: If guests details should be included or not

params.name: includeGuestRequirements
params.description: Includes guest requirements data in the response. Requires `includeGuestsDetails=true`.

params.name: includeCustomFields
params.description: If reservation custom fields should be included or not

params.name: guestID
params.description: Filters reservations with the supplied Guest ID (Including additional guests).

tools.name: get-room-blocks_list
tools.description: Returns a list of all room blocks considering the informed parameters. Optional: propertyID, roomBlockID, roomTypeID (plus 5 more).

params.name: startDate
params.description: Defaults to today. Start date - will filter for any room blocks that include this date (Date range must be one month or less)

params.name: endDate
params.description: Defaults to today. End date - will filter for any room blocks that include this date (Date range must be one month or less)

tools.name: get-room-types_list
tools.description: Returns a list of room types filtered by the selected parameters ### Group account support. Optional: propertyIDs, roomTypeIDs, startDate (plus 11 more).

params.name: roomTypeIDs
params.description: Room Type ID list, If more than one, send as comma-separated, i.e. 37,345,89

params.name: startDate
params.description: Check-in date. Required for the rates to be returned.

params.name: endDate
params.description: Check-out date. Required for the rates to be returned.

params.name: adults
params.description: Number of adults. Required for the rates to be returned.

params.name: children
params.description: Number of children. Required for the rates to be returned.

params.name: roomTypeName
params.description: Room type name, used to filter

params.name: maxGuests
params.description: Max number of guests, used to filter

params.name: sort
params.description: Sorting rules, semicolon-separated. Format: `field[:direction]`, where `direction` is `asc` or `desc`, defaults to `asc` if not provided. Valid fields: `sorting_position`. Examples: - `sort=sorting_position` - `sort=sorting_position:desc`

tools.name: get-rooms_list
tools.description: Returns a list of all rooms considering the informed parameters. If Check-in/out dates are sent, only unassigned rooms are returned. ### Group account support. Optional: propertyIDs, roomTypeID, roomTypeNameShort (plus 6 more).

params.name: startDate
params.description: Initial stay date. If sent, only returns unassigned rooms in this period. If not sent, will return all rooms available in property. Necessary if endDate is sent.

params.name: endDate
params.description: Final stay date. Necessary if startDate is sent.

params.name: includeRoomRelations
params.description: Determines whether room relations info should be included in the response

params.name: sort
params.description: Sorting rules, semicolon-separated. Format: `field[:direction]`, where `direction` is `asc` or `desc`, defaults to `asc` if not provided. Valid fields: `room_position`, `sorting_position`. Examples: - `sort=room_position;sorting_position` - `sort=room_position:asc;sorting_position:desc`

tools.name: get-rooms-fees-and-taxes_list
tools.description: Get applicable fees and tax to a booking. This is meant to be used on checkout to display to the guest. Required: startDate, endDate, roomsTotal, roomsCount. Optional: propertyID, adultsPerRoom, childrenPerRoom. Returns the GetRoomsFeesAndTaxesResponse.

params.name: roomsTotal
params.description: Total value of the rooms to be booked, with included taxes

params.name: roomsCount
params.description: Number of rooms to be booked

params.name: adultsPerRoom
params.description: Adult occupants per room (applied uniformly across `roomsCount`). Required for `fixed_per_person` taxes/fees to compute non-zero values; otherwise per-person amounts return 0.

params.name: childrenPerRoom
params.description: Child occupants per room. Same semantics as `adultsPerRoom`.

tools.name: get-rooms-unassigned_list
tools.description: Returns a list of unassigned rooms in the property. Call is alias of [getRooms](#api-Room-getRooms). Please check its documentation for parameters, response and example. ### Group account support. Optional: propertyIDs.

params.name: propertyIDs
params.description: List of property IDs, comma-separated, i.e. 37,345,89

tools.name: get-sources_list
tools.description: Gets available property sources. Optional: propertyIDs. Returns array of GetSourcesListItem.

params.name: propertyIDs
params.description: ID for the properties to be queried (comma-separated, i.e. 37,345,89).

tools.name: get-taxes-and-fees_list
tools.description: Returns the taxes and fees set for the property. Read the [Rate-Based tax (Dynamic Tax) guide](https://myfrontdesk.cloudbeds.com/hc/en-us/articles/360014103514-rate-based-tax-dynamic-tax) to understand its usage. Optional: propertyID, includeDeleted (default: false), includeExpired (default: false) (plus 7 more).

params.name: includeDeleted
params.description: If the response should include deleted taxes and fees

params.name: includeExpired
params.description: If the response should include expired taxes and fees

params.name: includeCustomItemTaxes
params.description: If the response should include custom item taxes

params.name: sourceId
params.description: Filter by booking source ID. Requires isRootSource and isHotelCollectBooking.

params.name: isRootSource
params.description: Root source flag. Required with sourceId.

params.name: isHotelCollectBooking
params.description: Hotel collect flag. Required with sourceId.

params.name: productId
params.description: Filter taxes/fees for a product. Mutually exclusive with addonId.

params.name: addonId
params.description: Filter taxes/fees for an addon (resolves to product). Mutually exclusive with productId.

tools.name: get-users_list
tools.description: Returns information on the properties' users ### Group account support. Optional: property_ids.

tools.name: get-webhooks_list
tools.description: List webhooks for which the API client is subscribed to. Optional: propertyID. Returns array of GetWebhooksListItem.

tools.name: list-allotment-block-notes_list
tools.description: List notes added to an allotment block. Required: propertyID, allotmentBlockCode. Optional: status, pageNumber, pageSize. Returns array of ListAllotmentBlockNotesListItem.

params.name: pageSize
params.description: Number of Items per Page (min 1, max 100)

tools.name: oauth_list
tools.description: In the context of properties being distributed across multiple localizations, this endpoint serves to retrieve the precise location of the property associated with the provided access token. Further information can be found in the [Authentication guide](https://integrations.cloudbeds.com/hc/en-us/sections/14731510501915-Authentication). Returns the GetMetadataResponse.

tools.name: patch-group_create
tools.description: Updates an existing group with information provided. At least one information field is required for this call. Optional: address1, address2, city (plus 8 more). Returns array of PatchGroupCreateItem.

tools.name: patch-rate_create
tools.description: Update the rate of the room based on rateID selected, based on the provided parameters. You can make multiple rate updates in a single API call. Providing a startDate and/or endDate will update rates only within the interval provided. Only non derived rates can be updated, requests to update a derived rate will return an error. This endpoint performs updates asynchronously, rate updates are added to a queue and the endpoint returns a job reference ID. This job reference ID can be used to track job status notifications or to look up details of the update once it is completed. The API is limited to 30 interval per update, sending more than 30 will return an error. Optional: rates.

tools.name: post-adjustment_create
tools.description: Adds an adjustment to a reservation. Optional: amount, itemID, notes (plus 3 more). Returns the new PostAdjustmentResponse.

params.name: itemID
params.description: Apply Adjustment to. Identifier for: product, tax, fee. Not for rate

tools.name: post-app-error_create
tools.description: Submit the error received by the hybrid integration from the partner to the MFD. Optional: description, entityID, entityType (plus 6 more). Returns the new PostAppErrorResponse.

params.name: entityID
params.description: Unique ID for the entity related to the error

params.name: entityType
params.description: Type of the entity related to the error

params.name: eventType
params.description: Description for the type of event that caused the error

params.name: statusCode
params.description: HTTP error status code or other error code ID

params.name: timestamp
params.description: Date/time that the error was received by the middleware

params.name: userID
params.description: User ID for the user that triggered event that caused the error

tools.name: post-app-property-settings_create
tools.description: Post app property settings. Optional: appClientID, key, propertyID (plus 1 more). Returns the new PostAppPropertySettingResponse.

tools.name: post-app-state_create
tools.description:
Update app integration state for a property ID.
This call is only available for third-party integration partners, and not for property client IDs.
If an app is set to 'disabled', it will remove all active sessions Read the [Connecting/Disconnecting Apps guide](https://integrations.cloudbeds.com/hc/en-us/articles/360007613213-Connecting-Disconnecting-Apps) to further understand the use cases. Optional: app_state, propertyID. Returns the new PostAppStateResponse.

params.name: app_state
params.description: Current integration state between third-party and property.

tools.name: post-charge_create
tools.description: Use a payment method to process a payment on a reservation, group profile, accounts receivable ledger, or house account. Optional: accountsReceivableLedgerID, amount, cardToken (plus 9 more). Returns the new PostChargeResponse.

params.name: description
params.description: Description of the payment to display on folio

params.name: isDeposit
params.description: determine if this payment is a deposit (default: false)

params.name: redirectUrl
params.description: client will be redirected to this page after he completed 3ds challenge. User will be redirected with HTTP get redirect and parameter **result** will be added to query string with possible values: - **failed** if 3ds challenge is not passed - **successful** if 3ds challenge is passed If not provided for card with 3ds the request will be rejected

tools.name: post-credit-card_create
tools.description: Returns the rate of the room type selected, based on the provided parameters. Optional: cardToken, paymentMethodId, propertyID (plus 2 more).

params.name: cardToken
params.description: cardToken provided by Stripe JS, not recommended, not required if paymentMethodId is provided

params.name: paymentMethodId
params.description: Payment Method ID provided by the payments SDK

params.name: returnUrl
params.description: client will be redirected to this page after he completed 3ds challenge. User will be redirected with HTTP get redirect and parameter **result** will be added to query string with possible values: - **failed** if 3ds challenge is not passed - **successful** if 3ds challenge is passed If not provided for card with 3ds the request will be rejected

tools.name: post-custom-field_create
tools.description: Sets custom fields. The call should only be made once to add the field to the system. Optional: applyTo (default: reservation), displayed, isPersonal (plus 6 more). Returns the new PostCustomFieldResponse.

params.name: applyTo
params.description: Where put this field in reservation or guest section of the booking. reservation - applies the custom field to reservations in myfrontdesk guest - applies the custom field to guest interface in myfrontdesk

params.name: displayed
params.description: ¹ Specify where this custom field to show up. reservation - applies the custom field to reservation interface in myfrontdesk booking - applies the custom field to the booking engine card - applies the custom field to Registration cards

params.name: isPersonal
params.description: Specifies if the contents of this field may contain personal information. User's personal information may be removed upon request according to GDPR rules.

params.name: maxCharacters
params.description: Maximum number of characters allowed to be entered in this field.

params.name: required
params.description: Specify whether this field is required to be filled out.

params.name: shortcode
params.description: Internal reference and is used for integration purposes such as custom links and the API

tools.name: post-custom-item_create
tools.description: Adds single, or multiple, custom items and their associated payments to a Reservation or House Account as a single transaction. Optional: groupCode, guestID, guestName (plus 10 more). Returns the new PostCustomItemResponse.

params.name: groupCode
params.description: Group identifier. Required if no reservationID or houseAccountID is provided.

params.name: houseAccountID
params.description: House account identifier. Required if no reservationID or groupCode is provided.

params.name: itemPaid
params.description: If the item is already paid. Note: If set to true, a payment in cash will be registered for the total value of the item, taxes and fees. If this is not the expected behavior, set to false, and register the operation manually. (Ignored if payments array exist)

params.name: items
params.description: list of items will be posted

params.name: payments
params.description: list of payments If the item is already paid

params.name: referenceID
params.description: partner's transaction reference. If exist then Cloudbeds will prevent adding of duplicates

params.name: reservationID
params.description: Reservation identifier. Required if no houseAccountID or groupCode is provided.

params.name: saleDate
params.description: Posting date. Defaults to current date.

tools.name: post-custom-payment-method_create
tools.description: Add a Custom Payment Method to a property. This call does not allow to add Payment Methods: credit cards, bank transfer or Pay Pal. Optional: method, methodName, propertyID. Returns the new PostCustomPaymentMethodResponse.

params.name: method
params.description: Payment Method, value used in future calls. Must be unique for each property and no whitespaces are allowed (use camel case or underline instead). Will be verified against existing Payment Methods, if it exists, will try to enable it.

params.name: methodName
params.description: Payment Method Name, value used to represent the Payment Method. Can use spaces. If nothing is sent, will use value for method.

params.name: propertyID
params.description: Property ID, if not sent will retrieve property ID from credentials, only one property ID call.

tools.name: post-email-schedule_create
tools.description: Creates a new email schedule for existing email template. Email template can be scheduled based on two parameters: reservationStatusChange and reservationEvent. Only one of the parameters can be used. *reservationStatusChange* schedules email to be sent when reservation status transitions to a specific one, for instance: `confirmed`. *reservationEvent* schedules email to be sent number of days prior or after a specific event, for instance: `after_check_out` at a given time This call is only available for third-party integration partners, and not for property client IDs. Optional: emailTemplateID, propertyID, schedule (plus 1 more). Returns the new PostEmailScheduleResponse.

params.name: emailTemplateID
params.description: ID of the email template that will be used when sending an email.

params.name: scheduleName
params.description: User friendly schedule name that appears in the list. Should contain app name.

tools.name: post-email-template_create
tools.description: Creates a new email template. See the full list of available language parameters here. This call is only available for third-party integration partners, and not for property client IDs. Optional: autofillAllLanguages, bcc, body (plus 9 more). Returns the new PostEmailTemplateResponse.

params.name: autofillAllLanguages
params.description: If set, all languages will be set with the value for the property language. If not informed and only one language is sent, it's considered true, if more than one language is sent, it'll be considered false.

params.name: bcc
params.description: Email address to which the email message may be sent as a Blind Carbon Copy

params.name: body
params.description: Email message body. The body key should be a language code (IETF). A few examples are listed below.

params.name: cc
params.description: Email address to which the email message may be sent as a Carbon Copy

params.name: emailType
params.description: Type of the email template: Marketing or Non-Marketing. Only applicable to GDPR-compliant properties.

params.name: from
params.description: Email address from which the email message may be sent

params.name: fromName
params.description: from which the email message may be sent. If empty email will be used

params.name: replyTo
params.description: Email address to which the email message may be replied. If empty, the value on from parameter will be used.

params.name: replyToName
params.description: Name to which the email message may be replied. If empty, email will be used.

params.name: subject
params.description: Email message subject. The subject key should be a language code (IETF). A few examples are listed below.

tools.name: post-file_create
tools.description: Attaches a file to a hotel. Optional: file, groupCode, propertyID. Returns the new PostFileResponse.

params.name: file
params.description:
Form-based File Upload
Allowed file types: *.

params.name: groupCode
params.description: optional - the group code if the file is to be attached to a group profile

tools.name: post-government-receipt_create
tools.description: Add a Government Receipt to a Reservation or House Account. Optional: amount, houseAccountID, identifier (plus 5 more). Returns the new PostGovernmentReceiptResponse.

params.name: houseAccountID
params.description: House Account identifier. It, or reservationID, is necessary.

params.name: identifier
params.description: Receipt Identifier of document. If not sent, a random identifier will be generated.

params.name: issueDate
params.description: Datetime of document emission, if not sent, current datetime will be assumed.

params.name: name
params.description: Name of the document. Will be used to describe document in MFD.

params.name: reservationID
params.description: Reservation identifier. It, or houseAccountID, is necessary.

params.name: url
params.description: URL for user to download document.

tools.name: post-group-note_create
tools.description: Adds a group note. Optional: groupCode, groupNote, propertyID. Returns array of PostGroupNoteCreateItem.

tools.name: post-guest_create
tools.description: Adds a guest to reservation as an additional guest. Optional: customFields, guestAddress1, guestAddress2 (plus 24 more). Returns the new PostGuestResponse.

params.name: customFields
params.description: Only guest custom fields are allowed.

params.name: guestDocumentExpirationDate
params.description: (mandatory when guestDocumentType is sent and is not DNI, NIE, or CPF)

params.name: guestDocumentIssueDate
params.description: (mandatory when guestDocumentType is sent and is not DNI or CPF)

params.name: guestDocumentIssuingCountry
params.description: Valid ISO-Code for Country (2 characters) (mandatory when guestDocumentType is sent)

params.name: guestDocumentType
params.description:
Document Type
dni - Identity card
nie - Residence permit
na - non selection
cpf - Brazilian Tax ID

params.name: guestNote
params.description: Note to be added to the Guest

params.name: reservationNote
params.description: Note to be added only to the Reservation.

tools.name: post-guest-document_create
tools.description: Attaches a document to a guest. Optional: file, guestID, propertyID. Returns the new PostGuestDocumentResponse.

params.name: file
params.description:
Form-based File Upload
Allowed file types: *.

tools.name: post-guest-note_create
tools.description: Adds a guest note. Optional: guestID, guestNote, propertyID (plus 1 more). Returns the new PostGuestNoteResponse.

params.name: guestNote
params.description: Note to be added to guest profile. It's strictly forbidden to send unencrypted payment data through the API. Numeric values longer than 12 characters and considered valid by Luhn's algorithm will be rejected.

params.name: userID
params.description: User ID Identify the actual user that is posting the note

tools.name: post-guest-photo_create
tools.description: Attaches a photo to a guest. Optional: file, guestID. Returns the new PostGuestPhotoResponse.

params.name: file
params.description:
Form-based File Upload
Allowed file types: *.jpg, *.jpeg, *.png, *.gif
Allowed max file size: 15MB

tools.name: post-guests-to-room_create
tools.description: Assigns guest(s) to a room in a reservation and adds these guests as additional guests. Optional: guestIDs, mainGuestId, propertyID (plus 5 more). Returns the new PostGuestsToRoomResponse.

params.name: guestIDs
params.description: Guest ID(s) to be assigned to room. If more than one, send as comma-separated, i.e. 37,345,89

params.name: mainGuestId
params.description: Guest ID to promote as main guest of the booking room. MUST be present in guestIDs. When omitted, the room's main guest is left unchanged.

params.name: removeAll
params.description: If set true, will remove all guests assigned to roomID before assigning guests sent in guestIDs parameter. Main Guest is never removed.

params.name: removeGuestIDs
params.description: If sent, will remove guest ID(s) before adding guests sent in guestIDs parameter. If more than one, send as comma-separated, i.e. 37,345,89. Main Guest is never removed.

params.name: removeGuestIDsFromRoom
params.description: If sent, will remove guest ID(s) only from the specified Room ID(s). If more than one, send as comma-separated, i.e. 37,345,89. Incompatible with removeAll parameter.

params.name: roomID
params.description: Room ID already assigned to Reservation

tools.name: post-housekeeper_create
tools.description: Add New Housekeeper. Optional: name, propertyID. Returns the new PostHousekeeperResponse.

tools.name: post-housekeeping-assignment_create
tools.description: Assign rooms (single or multiple) to an existing housekeeper. Optional: housekeeperID, propertyID, roomIDs. Returns the new PostHousekeepingAssignmentResponse.

params.name: housekeeperID
params.description: Housekeeper ID. To designate a room as unassigned, simply set the value to 0.

params.name: roomIDs
params.description: List of room IDs comma-separated, i.e. 37,345,89

tools.name: post-housekeeping-status_create
tools.description: Switches the current date's housekeeping status for a specific room ID to either clean or dirty The housekeeping status is calculated basing on the set of fields roomOccupied | roomCondition | roomBlocked | vacantPickup | roomBlocked | refusedService The available statuses are: - Vacant and Dirty (VD): false | “dirty” | false | false | false | false - Occupied and Dirty (OD): true | “dirty” | false | false | false | false - Vacant and Clean (VC): false | “clean” | false | false | false | false - Occupied and Clean (OC): true | “clean” | false | false | false | false - Occupied and Clean Inspected (OCI): true | “inspected” | false | false | false | false - Vacant and Clean Inspected (VCI): false | “inspected” | false | false | false | false - Do Not Disturb (DND): if doNotDisturb is true - Refused Service (RS): if refusedService is true - Out of Order (OOO): if roomBlocked is true - Vacant and Pickup (VP): if vacantPickup is true. Optional: doNotDisturb, propertyID, refusedService (plus 4 more). Returns the new PostHousekeepingStatusResponse.

params.name: roomCondition
params.description: New room condition. If no optional parameters are sent, will switch from current room condition. 'inspected' status is available only if the property has the feature enabled.

tools.name: post-item_create
tools.description: Adds an item either to a reservation or to a house account. Optional: groupCode, houseAccountID, itemID (plus 9 more). Returns the new PostItemResponse.

params.name: groupCode
params.description: Group identifier. Required if no reservationID or houseAccountID is provided.

params.name: houseAccountID
params.description: House account identifier. Required if no reservationID or groupCode is provided.

params.name: itemPaid
params.description: If the item is already paid. Note: If set to true, a payment in cash will be registered for the total value of the item, taxes and fees. If this is not the expected behavior, set to false, and register the operation manually. If payments is set, itemPaid is ignored.

params.name: itemPrice
params.description: Item price, if not sent, items registered price will be used

params.name: payments
params.description: list of payments If the item is already paid

params.name: reservationID
params.description: Reservation identifier. Required if no houseAccountID or groupCode is provided.

params.name: saleDate
params.description: Posting date. Defaults to current date.

tools.name: post-item-category_create
tools.description: Adds new items category. Optional: categoryCode, categoryColor (default: #ccc), categoryName (plus 2 more). Returns the new PostItemCategoryResponse.

params.name: itemID
params.description: Existing ItemIDs to reassign to new category

tools.name: post-items-to-inventory_create
tools.description:
Adds new items batch
¹ only if item.stockInventory = true
. Optional: item. Returns array of PostItemsToInventoryCreateItem.

tools.name: post-new-house-account_create
tools.description: Add a new House Account. Optional: accountName, isPrivate (default: false), propertyID. Returns the new PostNewHouseAccountResponse.

params.name: isPrivate
params.description: Whether House Account is available only to user

tools.name: post-payment_create
tools.description: Add a payment to a specified reservation, house account, or group. If multiple IDs are provided, precedence is reservationID, then houseAccountID, then groupCode. Optional: amount, cardType, description (plus 7 more). Returns the new PostPaymentResponse.

params.name: cardType
params.description: If type = credit, cardType is necessary. Allowed values are property based, but possible strings are: 'visa','master','amex','aura','diners','hiper','elo','Discover','jcb','maestro','dan','PostCard','Eurocard','union_pay'

params.name: description
params.description: Note to be added to payment

params.name: groupCode
params.description: Group Code. Required if neither reservationID nor houseAccountID is sent

params.name: houseAccountID
params.description: House Account identifier is necessary if reservationID not sent

params.name: isDeposit
params.description: determine if this payment is a deposit (default: false)

params.name: subReservationID
params.description: The Sub Reservation identifier. reservationID is still mandatory if subReservationID is sent.

params.name: type
params.description: Payment type. Use the call [getPaymentMethods](#api-Payment-getPaymentMethods) to get the properties enabled payment methods.

tools.name: post-reservation_create
tools.description: Adds a reservation to the selected property. Optional: adults, allotmentBlockCode, cardToken (plus 23 more). Returns the new PostReservationResponse.

params.name: allotmentBlockCode
params.description: Allotment block code to add reservation to allotment block.

params.name: cardToken
params.description: Credit Card identifier. Payment Method must be credit. This field should be filled with credit card identifier according to gateway. Only available for Stripe and should send the Customer ID.

params.name: dateCreated
params.description: Date reservation was made. Defaults to current date if omitted.

params.name: groupCode
params.description: Code from the Aggregate Allotment block the reservation will be added to.

params.name: paymentAuthorizationCode
params.description: Transaction identifier. Payment Method must be credit. This field should be filled with transaction identifier according to gateway. Only available for Stripe and it should be filled with Charge ID associated to the Payment Intent.

params.name: promoCode
params.description: Promotional code. Required for specials and packages that uses it. 'rateID' parameter required for using 'promoCode'.

params.name: sourceID
params.description:
The source ID for this reservation. Accepted formats:
's-{id}' for primary sources (no suffix), or
'ss-{id}-0' / 'ss-{id}-1' for third-party sources (suffix required: 0 = channel-collect, 1 = hotel-collect). The format must match the source type.

params.name: thirdPartyIdentifier
params.description: If it was received from a booking channel, this can be an identifier from that channel.

tools.name: post-reservation-document_create
tools.description: Attaches a document to a reservation. Optional: file, propertyID, reservationID. Returns the new PostReservationDocumentResponse.

params.name: file
params.description:
Form-based File Upload
Allowed file types: *.

tools.name: post-reservation-note_create
tools.description: Adds a reservation note. Optional: dateCreated, propertyID, reservationID (plus 2 more). Returns the new PostReservationNoteResponse.

params.name: reservationNote
params.description: Note to be added to reservation

params.name: userID
params.description: User ID Identify the actual user that is posting the note

tools.name: post-room-assign_create
tools.description: Assign/Reassign a room on a guest reservation. Optional: adjustPrice (default: false), newRoomID, oldRoomID (plus 6 more). Returns the new PostRoomAssignResponse.

params.name: adjustPrice
params.description: If room assignment would result in an upcharge or discount, this parameter needs to be set to true to approve the charges. If not set, the rate will retain its original value.

params.name: newRoomID
params.description: Room ID of the room that will be assigned. Empty field must be sent if you want to unassign a room.

params.name: oldRoomID
params.description: Room ID of the room that was assigned. Need to be provided in case of reassignment.

params.name: overrideRates
params.description: Deprecated. Please use adjustPrice instead. Setting overrideRates=true will have the opposite of the effect that the name implies. It will cause the rates to NOT be overridden, but instead to be recalculated based on the new room assignment.

params.name: reservationRoomID
params.description: Reservation room ID. Must be set if you want to unassign a room.

params.name: roomTypeID
params.description: Room Type ID of the room that will be assigned. Need to be provided in case of assignment.

tools.name: post-room-block_create
tools.description: Adds a room block to the selected property. Optional: email, endDate, firstName (plus 8 more). Returns the new PostRoomBlockResponse.

params.name: email
params.description: Email address - for courtesy hold updates

params.name: firstName
params.description: First name - for courtesy hold updates

params.name: lastName
params.description: Last name - for courtesy hold updates

params.name: lengthOfHoldInHours
params.description: Length of hold in hours - for courtesy hold updates

params.name: phone
params.description: Phone number - for courtesy hold updates

params.name: roomBlockType
params.description: Room block type. ‘blocked’ - Room block. ‘out_of_service’ - Out of service block. 'courtesy_hold' - Courtesy hold block.

params.name: rooms
params.description: All rooms for room block. When multiple rooms are submitted they will be created under the same roomBlockID. For properties using split inventory (virtual rooms linked to physical rooms), only provide the source rooms you want to block. Linked rooms will be automatically added. Do not include auto-added linked rooms in the request - the API will reject requests that include both a source room and its linked room(s).

tools.name: post-room-check-in_create
tools.description: Check-in a room already assigned for a guest. Optional: propertyID, reservationID, roomID (plus 1 more). Returns the new PostRoomCheckInResponse.

params.name: roomID
params.description: Room ID of the room that will be checked-in.

params.name: subReservationID
params.description: Sub Reservation identifier, allows for granular control over what room is being checked-in. If sent, roomID is ignored.

tools.name: post-room-check-out_create
tools.description: Check-out a room already assigned for a guest. If all rooms are checked out, the reservation status will update accordingly to 'Checked Out' as well. Optional: propertyID, reservationID, roomID (plus 1 more). Returns the new PostRoomCheckOutResponse.

params.name: roomID
params.description: Room ID of the room that will be checked out.

params.name: subReservationID
params.description: Sub Reservation identifier, allows for granular control over what room is being checked out. If sent, roomID is ignored.

tools.name: post-void-item_create
tools.description: Voids the itemID transaction on the specified Reservation ID, House Account ID, or Group. If payments were sent in calls [postItem](https://developers.cloudbeds.com/reference/post_postitem) or [postCustomItem](https://developers.cloudbeds.com/reference/post_postcustomitem), they will be deleted too. Optional: groupCode, houseAccountID, propertyID (plus 2 more). Returns the new PostVoidItemResponse.

params.name: groupCode
params.description: Group identifier. Required if no reservationID or houseAccountID is provided.

params.name: houseAccountID
params.description: House Account identifier. Required if no reservationID or groupCode is provided.

params.name: reservationID
params.description: Reservation identifier. Required if no houseAccountID or groupCode is provided.

tools.name: post-void-payment_create
tools.description: Voids a payment (using paymentID) to a specified reservation or house account. Optional: houseAccountID, paymentID, propertyID (plus 1 more). Returns the new PostVoidPaymentResponse.

params.name: houseAccountID
params.description: House Account identifier is necessary if reservationID not sent

params.name: paymentID
params.description: paymentID of transaction that should be voided.

tools.name: post-webhook_create
tools.description: Subscribe a webhook for a specified event. Read the [Webhooks guide](https://integrations.cloudbeds.com/hc/en-us/articles/360007612553-Webhooks) to see available objects, actions, payload info and more. Optional: action, endpointUrl, object (plus 1 more). Returns the new PostWebhookResponse.

tools.name: put-app-property-settings_create
tools.description: Put app property settings. Optional: key, propertyID, value. Returns the new PostPutAppPropertySettingsResponse.

tools.name: put-group_create
tools.description: Adds a group to the property. Please note that the default setting for 'Route to Group Folio' will be 'No,' and the 'Reservation Folio Configuration' will be set as the default folio configuration. You can edit these settings through the user interface (UI). Optional: address1, address2, city (plus 8 more). Returns array of PutGroupCreateItem.

tools.name: put-guest_update
tools.description: Updates an existing guest with information provided. At least one information field is required for this call. Optional: guestAddress1, guestAddress2, guestBirthDate (plus 22 more). Returns the updated PutGuestResponse.

params.name: guestDocumentExpirationDate
params.description: (mandatory when guestDocumentType is sent and is not DNI, NIE, or CPF)

params.name: guestDocumentIssueDate
params.description: (mandatory when guestDocumentType is sent and is not DNI or CPF)

params.name: guestDocumentIssuingCountry
params.description: ISO-Code for Country (2 characters) (mandatory when guestDocumentType is sent)

params.name: guestDocumentType
params.description:
It is mandatory to send all document information
na - non selection
dni - Identity card
nie - Residence permit
cpf - Brazilian Tax ID

params.name: guestTaxId
params.description: Guest tax ID unencrypted payment data through the API. Numeric values longer than 12 characters and considered valid by Luhn's algorithm will be rejected.

tools.name: put-guest-note_update
tools.description: Updates an existing guest note. Optional: guestID, guestNote, noteID (plus 1 more). Returns the updated PutGuestNoteResponse.

params.name: guestNote
params.description: Note to be added to guest profile. It's strictly forbidden to send unencrypted payment data through the API. Numeric values longer than 12 characters and considered valid by Luhn's algorithm will be rejected.

tools.name: put-house-account-status_update
tools.description: Change specific house account to either open or closed. Optional: houseAccountID, propertyID, status. Returns the updated PutHouseAccountStatusResponse.

tools.name: put-housekeeper_update
tools.description: Edit Housekeeper Details. Optional: housekeeperID, name, propertyID. Returns the updated PutHousekeeperResponse.

tools.name: put-item-to-inventory_update
tools.description:
Updates an item with information provided
¹ only if item.stockInventory = true
. Optional: itemCode, itemDescription, itemID (plus 10 more). Returns the updated PutItemToInventoryResponse.

params.name: itemQuantity
params.description: ¹ Current amount of item available

params.name: itemSKU
params.description: Item SKU. Will be generated if not set

params.name: reorderThreshold
params.description: ¹ Quantity at which to reorder item

params.name: stockInventory
params.description: Track stock inventory for this item

params.name: stopSell
params.description: ¹ Quantity at which to stop selling product.

params.name: stopSellMet
params.description: ¹ true - Whether item is at or below value set for stop-sell threshold.

tools.name: put-rate_create
tools.description: Update the rate of the room based on rateID selected, based on the provided parameters. You can make multiple rate updates in a single API call. Providing a startDate and/or endDate will update rates only within the interval provided. Only non derived rates can be updated, requests to update a derived rate will return an error. This endpoint performs updates asynchronously, rate updates are added to a queue and the endpoint returns a job reference ID. This job reference ID can be used to track job status notifications or to look up details of the update once it is completed. The API is limited to 30 interval per update, sending more than 30 will return an error. Optional: rates.

tools.name: put-reservation_update
tools.description: Updates a reservation, such as custom fields, estimated arrival time, room configuration and reservation status. Optional: allotmentBlockCode, checkoutDate, customFields (plus 8 more). Returns the updated PutReservationResponse.

params.name: allotmentBlockCode
params.description: Allotment block code to link the reservation to. Send null to unlink. If provided along with eventCode, the allotment block must belong to the event.

params.name: checkoutDate
params.description: Update the checkoutDate across the whole reservation

params.name: dateCreated
params.description: Date reservation was made. Do not change if omitted.

params.name: eventCode
params.description: Event (group profile) code to link the reservation to. Send null to unlink. When sent without allotmentBlockCode, links to the group profile only.

params.name: reservationID
params.description: Reservation Unique Identifier, one reservation ID per call.

params.name: rooms
params.description: Array with rooms information to change accommodations assigned to the reservation

params.name: sendStatusChangeEmail
params.description: Send email on reservation status change to property and guest.

params.name: status
params.description:
Reservation status
'confirmed' - Reservation is confirmed
'not_confirmed' - Reservation not passed confirmation
'canceled' - Reservation is canceled
'checked_in' - Guest is in hotel
'checked_out' - Guest already left hotel
'no_show' - Guest didn't showed up on check-in date

tools.name: put-reservation-note_update
tools.description: Updates an existing reservation note. Optional: propertyID, reservationID, reservationNote (plus 1 more). Returns the updated PutReservationNoteResponse.

params.name: reservationNote
params.description: Note to be added to reservation

tools.name: put-room-block_update
tools.description: Updates a room block. Optional: email, endDate, firstName (plus 8 more). Returns the updated PutRoomBlockResponse.

params.name: email
params.description: Email address - for courtesy hold updates

params.name: firstName
params.description: First name - for courtesy hold updates

params.name: lastName
params.description: Last name - for courtesy hold updates

params.name: lengthOfHoldInHours
params.description: Length of hold in hours - for courtesy hold updates

params.name: phone
params.description: Phone number - for courtesy hold updates

params.name: rooms
params.description: All rooms for room block. When multiple rooms are submitted they will be created under the same roomBlockID. For properties using split inventory (virtual rooms linked to physical rooms), only provide the source rooms you want to block. Linked rooms will be automatically added. Do not include auto-added linked rooms in the request - the API will reject requests that include both a source room and its linked room(s). Auto-added rooms cannot be individually swapped out; to remove an auto-added room, you must remove or swap its source room.

tools.name: update-allotment-block_create
tools.description: Update an allotment block @apiQuery {Integer} propertyID Property ID. Optional: allotmentBlockCode, allotmentBlockName, allotmentBlockStatus (plus 4 more). Returns array of UpdateAllotmentBlockCreateItem.

params.name: allotmentBlockCode
params.description: The allotment block code identifying the allotment block to update

params.name: allotmentBlockName
params.description: The name for the allotment block

params.name: allotmentBlockStatus
params.description: The status for the allotment block under

params.name: allotmentIntervals
params.description: The day-based data for the allotment block.

params.name: allowOverbooking
params.description: If false, or omitted, then this update will fail if it would result in an overbooking. If true, then the update will succeed even if it results in an overbooking.

params.name: autoRelease
params.description: Optional auto-release configuration NOTE: pass empty object to remove auto-release configuration

tools.name: update-allotment-block-notes_create
tools.description: Update a note on an allotment block. Optional: allotmentBlockCode, noteID, propertyID (plus 2 more). Returns the new PostUpdateAllotmentBlockNotesResponse.

tools.name: userinfo_list
tools.description: Returns information on user who authorized connection. Optional: property_id, role_details.

params.name: property_id
params.description: Specify a property ID when using role_details

params.name: role_details
params.description: Specify whether to include role and acl details of the user.
